'''Demmings''' was a Human male who served as a [[Commander/Legends|commander]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], as well as an [[Imperial Liaison|intermediary]] between the Empire and the [[Tiss'sharl League]] on [[Tiss'sharl]].

==Biography==
Following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] Demmings was serving in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], primarily as an adjutant to the [[Supreme Commander (Galactic Empire)/Legends|Supreme Commander]],<ref name="kenner">{{KennerCite|set=Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (toy line)|pack=Darth Vader vs. Prince Xizor|link=soteKxizor-vader.asp}}</ref> [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], and as [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Reprisal (Imperial II-class)|''Reprisal'']], the current command [[Starship/Legends|ship]] of his superior. In this capacity, he played a prominent role in the hunt for the elusive [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Rebel Fleet]] , and the final pacification of [[Jabiim/Legends|Jabiim]]. Commander Demmings accompanied [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] Vader on his third visit to the Tiss'shar on [[Tiss'sharl]]. During the conferential dinner, the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] introduced him to their hosts as the new local [[Imperial Liaison]], replacing the late [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Giiedt]] whose suspicious demise was owed to the internal strife within the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] leadership.<ref name="Power">[[Empire 31|''Empire'' 31]]</ref>
